# Backend Python Engineer

## Overview
We are looking for a Backend Python Engineer to build and maintain scalable APIs and data services for our platform. You will work on microservices, performance tuning, and integrations with external systems.

## Responsibilities
- Design and implement REST APIs with Python and FastAPI
- Build asynchronous workers for background processing
- Optimize database queries and caching strategies
- Collaborate on architecture and code reviews

## Requirements (Must-have)
- Python (3+ years)
- FastAPI or Flask
- PostgreSQL
- REST API design
- Unit testing (pytest)

## Nice-to-have
- Docker
- Kubernetes
- Redis
- Celery
- Experience with CI/CD

## Seniority
Senior

## Domain
backend
